gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Game runs. When an Xbox 360 controller is plugged in your character will auto-run, probably due to the game not using a deadzone on the analog stick. Unclear whether this and some other bugs (I fell through a platform and walked through a wall) are because of Proton or are native to the game itself.
title: Blacksmith Run
